title: Self Intro
description:
Please use the attached prompts for your Self Intro.

Students may earn up to 5 points for this submission. To earn full credit, please:

  • Name File Correctly
  • Use complete sentences (other than for name)
  • Use spellcheck 

Thank you for your thoughtful response.
